sympy.name: sympy
sympy.description: Symbolic math verification using SymPy. Use for sign checks on derivatives, second-order conditions, comparative statics, simplification, solving for closed-form roots, and substitution of calibration values for numerical sanity checks. Always try SymPy first for concrete symbolic computation; escalate to codex-math when the problem requires reasoning rather than computation. SymPy is preinstalled by setup.sh.
